field.label: Enable DS-Lite
field.help: Enable the DS-Lite (Dual-Stack Lite) IPv4-in-IPv6 tunnel.

field.label: ISP Profile
field.help: Select your ISP service. This sets the correct AFTR address automatically.

field.label: WAN Interface
field.help: Select the WAN interface with IPv6 connectivity (DHCPv6).

field.label: AFTR Hostname
field.help: AFTR hostname for DNS resolution. Used when ISP profile is "Custom".

field.label: AFTR IPv6 Address
field.help: Static AFTR IPv6 address. Leave empty to resolve from hostname or use ISP profile default.

field.label: MTU
field.help: Tunnel interface MTU. Default 1460 (1500 - 40 byte IPv6 header).

field.label: TCP MSS Clamp
field.help: TCP Maximum Segment Size clamping value. Default 1420.

field.label: Enable NAT
field.help: Enable IPv4 NAT (masquerade) on the tunnel interface. Required for most setups.
